pageContext.name: Boba Fett 1oz Silver Coin
pageContext.description: Sideshow and New Zealand Mint are proud to present the limited-edition Mandalorian Poster Coin Collection. Join the way of the Mandalore with New Zealand Mint's third release in the new silver Star Wars™ collectible Coin Series for the hit Lucasfilm series The Mandalorian™!  This one-of-a-kind Sideshow Exclusive coin features Boba Fett™, an unaltered genetic clone of his father, Jango Fett™. Boba Fett is regarded as one of the most fearsome and powerful bounty hunters in the galaxy. The officially licensed coin features the cunning warrior in color with his intimidating Mandalorian armor and deadly weaponry!  The engraved phrase 'Boba Fett Lives' sits alongside his Mythosaur™ signet, and an engraved masthead rounds off the coin design. The obverse simply shows the Ian Rank-Broadley effigy of Her Majesty Queen Elizabeth II, to confirm it as a legal tender coin.   Only 2,000 will be made, don't miss your chance to own the Boba Fett 1oz Silver Coin.
